rulings.Case Title: ALFONSO HARO VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday 17, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANTs BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overrule, first cause of action CC 2923.5; second cause of action sustain with leave to amend; third and fourth causes of action sustain with leave to amend to allege reasonable diligence showing tolling of statute of limitations and required particularity; fifth cause of action sustain with leave to amend to allege contractual relationship at time of wrong doing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 589 POST STREET LLC VS. JOHN WILLIAM et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday 17, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT JOHN WILLIAMS DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MALENA E REED VS. SHUN XIANG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday 17, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANTs SHUN XIANG and CAIYUN YANG's DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Deny, five days to respond. Three day notice for non-payment proper in this case. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUEY QUON SIU et al VS. MAUREEN MCCLENDON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday 17, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT MAUREEN MCCLENDON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. Complaint alleges prior written notices given. = (501/REQ)
